shared_case_surface: bounded change artifacts that can be judged on visible request fit, completeness, and reviewability while still pairing honestly with workflow-side evidence on the same cases
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the artifact cases only if the replacement preserves the same bounded change ask class, keeps the artifact surface inspectable without private house style, and still supports paired artifact/process comparison on the same cases.
public_safe_requirements: visible request is sufficient for bounded artifact review
paired artifact/process reading remains possible on the same case family
